name: Chatarmin
description: Chatarmin — WhatsApp marketing automation platform for e-commerce with flows, broadcasts, and CRM sync.

seo.title: Chatarmin — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Chatarmin: Chatarmin — WhatsApp marketing automation platform for e-commerce with flows, broadcasts, and CRM sync.

when_to_use: WhatsApp abandoned cart recovery for Shopify store
Broadcast promotions to WhatsApp opt-in list
WhatsApp bot for order tracking and FAQs
CRM sync for WhatsApp conversation history
Post-purchase review request via WhatsApp automation

pros: E-commerce-focused WhatsApp flows with Shopify, Klaviyo sync
Revenue attribution baked into campaign reports
cons: Pricing sits above Indian BSP competitors
Narrow focus — limited for non-commerce use cases
Smaller integration catalog than Klaviyo or Gorgias
Still maturing, some feature gaps vs Wati/Respond
review.verdict: WhatsApp marketing tool built for DTC brands in Europe — strong Shopify story, premium price.
review.best_for: European Shopify brands adding WhatsApp to an existing email stack
review.not_for: Support-heavy teams or B2B sellers outside e-commerce flows
